Result.title: Decoding complete
Result.subtitle: Your reading from Wol-a is open.
Result.overviewBody: {name}'s destiny gathers momentum through {k1}, {k2}, and {k3}. This moment is where your data begins to shape its own 'grain'—quietly, but decisively.
Result.personalityBody: You handle {k2} with a rare kind of finesse. Your patience with {k1} and your instinct for {k3} keep your choices balanced—especially in relationships and decisions.
Result.futureBody: The change ahead will expand gradually in the timing of {k1}. When you trust {k2} and translate {k3} into action, your opportunities become unmistakably clear.
Result.saveImageError: Couldn’t save the image. Please try again.

Result.freeCrisisLine: {name}, that’s the preview. Below: wealth, work, love, bonds, Life Peak Timeline, prescriptions, monthly D-Day — all locked. Premium unlocks the full decode.
